response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced and versatile Staff Software Engineer with strong distributed systems and polyglot programming skills. However, he lacks the executive leadership background, experience scaling engineering organizations from 10 to 30+ people, and deep production expertise in both Agentic AI and algorithmic fintech infrastructure required for this CTO position.
strengths: Extensive backend and distributed systems experience, including handling high-throughput microservices at scale.
Exposure to financial technology and investment platforms through his tenure at RIDE Capital.
Recent hands-on exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling.
concerns: Lacks executive-level engineering leadership experience and a track record of scaling engineering teams from 10 to 30+ people.
No demonstrated experience architecting complex, production-grade multi-agent AI systems for high-stakes financial decisioning.
Missing experience in designing and governing hybrid engineering models with external delivery partners.
